rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: SocGholish Script File Whoami Output to File (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: SocGholish Script File Whoami Output to File (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 0886986b-47e9-41e8-87c7-41b202503b24
status: experimental
description: Detects wscript spawning CMD which in turn runs whoami, with the output
  of the command directed to a file. Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/socgholish/#threat-socgholish
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.discovery
- attack.t1033
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \wscript.exe
    Image|endswith: \cmd.exe
    CommandLine|contains|windash:
    - whoami /all >
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
